chunks.text: Mailing Lists | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Mailing Lists The Department offers a self-serve mailing list service using the Sympa mailing list manager. Lists can be created by anyone who has a Standard

Lists can be created by anyone who has a Standard Account in EECS. The mailing list server can be accessed at https://lists.eecs.berkeley.edu/ . Login with your EECS email address (e.g. joesmith@eecs.berkeley.edu) and your EECS Windows/LDAP password

.berkeley.edu) and your EECS Windows/LDAP password . Mailing list membership can be configured to come from other lists, or from external databases, and can easily include non-EECS recipients. For simple mailing list needs, you may also consider bCon

ple mailing list needs, you may also consider bConnected Lists (Google Groups) . See also: Mailing List FAQ bConnected Lists Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages
uled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
